# npmrc-replace-env

> A utility for generating `.npmrc` files from a `.npmrc.config` template by replacing environment variable placeholders via dotenv-flow.

## Documentation

- [README](./README.md): Installation, usage, configuration, and CLI options

## Source

- [src/cli.ts](./src/cli.ts): CLI entry point (yargs-based, `--prefix` / `--without-prefix` options)
- [src/index.ts](./src/index.ts): Public API (`writeNpmrc`)
- [src/utils/](./src/utils/): Core utilities (read config, generate npmrc, resolve env values)
- [src/constants/defaults.const.ts](./src/constants/defaults.const.ts): Default file names and env prefix (`NPMRC_`)
